response:
1. The area of the dining area is $ A_{\text{dining}} = 20 \times 15 = 300 $ square meters.  
   The area of the zen garden is $ A_{\text{garden}} = \pi r^2 $.  
   The dining area available for tables is $ A_{\text{tables}} = 300 - \pi r^2 $.  
   According to the requirement, $ A_{\text{tables}} = 2 \times A_{\text{garden}} $, so:  
   $$
   300 - \pi r^2 = 2\pi r^2
   $$  
   $$
   300 = 3\pi r^2
   $$  
   $$
   r^2 = \frac{300}{3\pi} = \frac{100}{\pi}
   $$  
   $$
   r = \sqrt{\frac{100}{\pi}} \approx \sqrt{31.83} \approx 5.64 \text{ meters}
   $$  

2. The radius of the fountain is $ \frac{r}{3} = \frac{5.64}{3} \approx 1.88 $ meters.  
   The surface area of the cylindrical fountain (excluding the base) is the lateral surface area:  
   $$
   A_{\text{fountain}} = 2\pi r h = 2\pi (1.88)(1.5) \approx 17.86 \text{ square meters}
   $$  
   The cost is $ 17.86 \times 50 = 893 $ dollars.  

**Answer:** 893
